debug_info.goal:
case h
a : Type
p : a → Bool
sl : Chapter3.SymList a
lhs rhs : List a
ok :
  (lhs.isEmpty = true → rhs.isEmpty = true ∨ rhs.length = 1) ∧
    (rhs.isEmpty = true → lhs.isEmpty = true ∨ lhs.length = 1)
⊢ dropWhile p (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok)) =
    Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.dropWhileSL a p (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok))

failed_attempts:
· cases as <;> simp_all
    match hfs : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [hfs] at hh
    | x :: xs => simp [hfs] at hh ht; subst x; simp [dropWhile, h3, ih, ht]
  | h3 sl h1 hsl h2 h3 =>
    unfold dropWhileSL; simp [h1, h2, h3]
    have hh : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; simp [headSL, fromSL] at *; split at h2 <;> simp_all
    match hfs : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [hfs] at hh
    | x :: xs => simp [hfs] at hh; subst x; simp [dropWhile, h3, hfs]

· simp [fromSL, has, has1]
    cases hf : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [hf] at h_head
    | cons x xs => simp [hf] at h_head; subst x; simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, h3, h_tail, hf]
  | case4 h1 h2 hsl h3 =>
    unfold dropWhileSL; simp [h1, h2, h3]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; simp [fromSL, headSL] at h2 ⊢; split at h2 <;> (rename_i h_1; simp_all); simp_all [ok]
    cases hf : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [hf] at h_head
    | cons x xs => simp [hf] at h_head; subst x; simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, h3, hf]

| case4 sl h1 hsl hhead hp =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, hhead, hp]
    have hne : fromSL sl ≠ [] := by have := hh sl; rw [hhead] at this; cases fromSL sl <;> simp_all
    rw [List.head_cons_tail hne, Chapter1.dropWhile]
    have : (fromSL sl).head hne = hsl := by have := hh sl; rw [hhead, List.head_cons_tail hne] at this; simp at this; exact this.symm
    simp [this, hp]

match h_fs : fromSL sl with
        | [] => simp [h_fs] at h_head
        | x :: xs =>
          simp [h_fs] at h_head; subst x; simp [h_fs, dropWhile, h_h]
          split <;> [simp [ih, h_tail]; rfl]

if hp : p h then
          rw [ih (tailSL sl) (length_tail_lt_length sl (by intro h_n; subst h_n; simp [nil, headSL] at h_h)), ← h_tail]
          cases h_fs : fromSL sl <;> simp_all [dropWhile]
        else
          cases h_fs : fromSL sl <;> simp_all [dropWhile]

have h_tail : ∀ sl hsl, headSL sl = some hsl → fromSL sl = hsl :: fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
    intro sl hsl h2
    cases sl; rename_i l r ok; unfold headSL fromSL tailSL at *; split at h2 <;> (simp at *; subst_vars)
    . cases ok.1 rfl <;> (try rename_i h'; cases r) <;> simp_all [fromSL, nil, splitInTwoSL]
    . split <;> (rename_i h'; try split) <;> simp [fromSL, splitInTwoSL, *]
  induction SymList.mk lhs rhs ok using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 sl h => unfold dropWhileSL; simp [h]; cases sl; simp_all [fromSL, nil]
  | case2 sl h1 h2 => unfold dropWhileSL; simp [h1, h2]; cases sl; unfold headSL fromSL nil at *; split at h2 <;> simp_all
  | case3 sl h1 hsl h2 h3 ih => simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ih, h_tail sl hsl h2]
  | case4 sl h1 hsl h2 h3 => simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, h_tail sl hsl h2]

have hh : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; rename_i as bs ok; simp [fromSL, headSL] at *
      cases as <;> (simp_all; try { cases bs; rfl; rename_i b bs; cases ok.left rfl <;> simp_all })
    match hfs : fromSL sl with | [] => rfl | x :: xs => simp at hh; subst x; simp [dropWhile, h_p, hfs]

| cons a as =>
          simp [headSL] at h_head; subst hsl; simp [tailSL]; split_ifs with h1 h2
          · simp [h1] at h_empty
          · simp [splitInTwoSL, fromSL]
            generalize h_split : List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo (Subtype.mk (r.reverse) (by rfl)) = p'
            have ⟨⟨p1, _⟩, ⟨p2, _⟩⟩ := p'; simp [p'.2]
          · simp [fromSL]
      simp [h_from, Chapter1.dropWhile]
      split_ifs with h_p
      · have hne : sl ≠ nil := by intro h; rw [h] at h_head; contradiction
        rw [ih (tailSL sl) (length_tail_lt_length sl hne)]
      · rfl

have hh : ∀ s : SymList a, (fromSL s).head? = headSL s := fun s => by
    cases s; rename_i l r o; simp [fromSL, headSL]
    cases l with | cons x xs => rfl | nil =>
      cases r with | nil => rfl | cons y ys =>
        simp; simp at o; have := o.1 rfl; cases this <;> simp_all
  have ht : ∀ s : SymList a, fromSL (tailSL s) = (fromSL s).tail := fun s => by
    cases s; rename_i xs ys ok
    cases xs with
    | nil => cases ys with | nil => rfl | cons b bs =>
      simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]; simp at ok; have := ok.1 rfl; cases this <;> simp_all
    | cons a as => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [tailSL, h, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
      have := List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo_spec ⟨ys.reverse, rfl⟩; simp [fromSL, ← this]
  induction mk lhs rhs ok using dropWhileSL.induct (p := p)
  · rename_i sl h; simp [dropWhileSL, h, fromSL, nil]; simp [isEmpty] at h; simp [h.1, h.2]
  · rename_i sl h1 h2; rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h1, h2, fromSL, nil]; rw [← hh] at h2; simp [List.head?_eq_none_iff.mp h2, dropWhile]
  · rename_i sl h1 hsl h2 h3 ih; rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h1, h2, h3, ih]; rw [← hh] at h2
    rw [List.head?_eq_some_iff.mp h2, dropWhile, h3, ht]
  · rename_i sl h1 hsl h2 h3; rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h1, h2, h3]; rw [← hh] at h2
    rw [List.head?_eq_some_iff.mp h2, dropWhile, h3]

· simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL, List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo]
        · simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ← ih, ← h_tail]
    match hfs : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [hfs, headSL] at h2
    | x :: xs =>
      have : x = hsl := by rw [← h_head, hfs] at h2; injection h2
      subst x; simp [hfs, dropWhile, h3]
  | case4 sl h1 hsl h2 h3 =>
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl; simp [headSL, fromSL]; split
      · simp; cases ok.1 (by rfl) <;> simp_all
      · rename_i y ys; cases ys; simp; contradiction
      · simp
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3]
    match hfs : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [hfs, headSL] at h2
    | x :: xs =>
      have : x = hsl := by rw [← h_head, hfs] at h2; injection h2
      subst x; simp [hfs, dropWhile, h3]

have h_fs : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by rw [head_from, h_head]
    match h_from : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [h_from] at h_fs
    | x :: xs => simp [h_fs] at h_fs; subst x; simp [dropWhile, hp, h_from]
  where
    head_from {s} : (fromSL s).head? = headSL s := by
      match s with | ⟨[], [], _⟩ => rfl | ⟨[], y::ys, ok⟩ =>
        simp [fromSL, headSL]; have := ok.1 (by rfl); cases this with | inl h => simp [h] at * | inr h => simp at h; simp [h]
      | ⟨x::xs, ys, _⟩ => rfl
    tail_from {s} : fromSL (tailSL s) = (fromSL s).tail := by
      match s with
      | ⟨[], ys, ok⟩ =>
        cases ys with | nil => rfl | cons b bs =>
          simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; have := ok.1 (by rfl); cases this with | inl h => simp [h] at * | inr h => simp at h; simp [h]
      | ⟨a::as, ys, ok⟩ =>
        by_cases h_as : as = [] <;> simp [tailSL, h_as, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
        simp [List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo, List.take_append_drop]

have hh : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; simp [headSL, fromSL] at h2 ⊢; split at h2 <;> (rename_i h; simp_all [ok])
    have ht : (fromSL sl).tail = fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
      cases sl; rename_i as bs ok; cases as with
      | nil => cases ok.1 (by simp_all) with | inl h => simp_all [fromSL, tailSL, nil] | inr h => cases bs with | nil => simp at h | cons b bs => cases bs; simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; simp at h
      | cons a as => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [fromSL, tailSL, h, splitInTwoSL]; exact (List.MergeSort.Internal.splitInTwo ⟨_, rfl⟩).2.2.symm
    cases f : fromSL sl with | nil => simp [f] at hh | cons x xs => simp [f] at hh; subst x; simp [f, dropWhile, h3, ht]
  | case4 sl h1 hsl h2 h3 =>
    unfold dropWhileSL; simp [h1, h2, h3]
    have hh : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      cases sl; simp [headSL, fromSL] at h2 ⊢; split at h2 <;> (rename_i h; simp_all [ok])
    cases f : fromSL sl with | nil => simp [f] at hh | cons x xs => simp [f] at hh; subst x; simp [f, dropWhile, h3]

have hh : (fromSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩).head? = headSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := by
    simp [headSL, fromSL]; cases lhs <;> cases rhs <;> simp_all
    case nil.cons y ys => cases ok.1 (by rfl) <;> simp_all
  have ht : fromSL (tailSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩) = (fromSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩).tail := by
    cases lhs with
    | nil =>
      cases rhs with
      | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
      | cons b bs => simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; cases ok.1 (by rfl) <;> simp_all; case inr h => cases bs <;> simp_all
    | cons a as => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [tailSL, h, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
  induction ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 h => simp [dropWhileSL, h, fromSL, nil]; simp [isEmpty] at h; simp [fromSL, h.1, h.2]
  | case2 h1 h2 => rw [headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at h2; simp_all
  | case3 h1 hsl h2 h3 ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ← ih, ht, ← hh, h2]
    cases h_fs : fromSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ <;> simp_all
  | case4 h1 hsl h2 h3 =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ← hh, h2]
    cases h_fs : fromSL ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ <;> simp_all

have h_head (s : SymList a) : (fromSL s).head? = headSL s := by
    cases s; rename_i l r o; simp [fromSL, headSL]
    split <;> rename_i h <;> simp_all
    cases o.1 (by simp) <;> rename_i h' <;> simp_all
  have h_tail (s : SymList a) : fromSL (tailSL s) = (fromSL s).tail := by
    cases s; rename_i xs ys ok; cases xs with
    | nil =>
      cases ys with | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
      | cons b bs =>
        simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; cases ok.1 (by simp) with
        | inl h => simp [h] at *
        | inr h => cases bs with | nil => simp | cons _ _ => simp at h
    | cons a as => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
  induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | h1 sl h => simp [dropWhileSL, h, fromSL, Chapter1.dropWhile, List.isEmpty_iff.1 h.1, List.isEmpty_iff.1 h.2]
  | h2 sl h1 h2 => simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2] at h1
  | h3 sl h1 hsl h2 h3 ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ih, h_tail, ← h_head, h2]
    cases fromSL sl <;> simp_all [Chapter1.dropWhile]
  | h4 sl h1 hsl h2 h3 =>
    rw [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ← h_head, h2]
    cases fromSL sl <;> simp_all [Chapter1.dropWhile]

induction sl using (WellFounded.induction (measure lengthSL)) with
  | h sl ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; split_ifs with h_e
    · have : fromSL sl = [] := by have ⟨l, r, _⟩ := sl; simp [isEmpty] at h_e; simp [fromSL, h_e]
      simp [this, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
    · match h_h: headSL sl with
      | none => have := headSL_none_iff_nilSL.mp h_h; simp [this, nil, fromSL, dropWhile]
      | some hsl =>
        have h_he : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
          have ⟨as, bs, ok'⟩ := sl; simp [fromSL, headSL] at h_h ⊢; cases as <;> simp_all
          rename_i b bs; cases ok'.1 rfl <;> (rename_i k; simp [k] at *; try (rw [List.length_eq_one_iff] at k; have ⟨y, hy⟩ := k; subst bs; simp [fromSL, nil])); simp
        match h_f: fromSL sl with
        | [] => simp at h_he
        | x :: xs =>
          simp at h_he; subst x; simp [dropWhile]; split_ifs with hp
          · rw [ih (tailSL sl) (length_tail_lt_length sl (by rintro rfl; simp [headSL] at h_h))]
            have ⟨as, bs, ok'⟩ := sl; cases as with
            | nil =>
              cases bs with | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil] | cons b bs =>
                simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; cases ok'.1 rfl <;> (rename_i k; simp [k] at *; try (rw [List.length_eq_one_iff] at k; have ⟨y, hy⟩ := k; subst bs; simp [fromSL, nil])); simp [fromSL, nil]
            | cons a as => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL, List.tail]
          · rfl
· rename_i h1 h2 hsl hp; rw [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, hp, h_f _ _ h2]; simp [dropWhile, hp]

induction sl using (wellFoundedInduction (measure lengthSL)) with
  | h sl ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; split
    · rename_i h0; simp [sl_empty_l_empty sl h0, Chapter1.dropWhile, nil, fromSL]
    · split
      · rename_i hh; simp [headSL_none_iff_nilSL.mp hh, fromSL, nil, Chapter1.dropWhile]
      · rename_i hsl hh; simp [hh]
        have hf : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
          cases sl with | mk l r o => 
          simp [headSL, fromSL] at hh ⊢; split at hh <;> injection hh with h_eq <;> subst h_eq <;> simp_all
          rename_i y ys; have := o.1 (by simp); simp_all; cases ys; rfl; contradiction
        match hf2 : fromSL sl with
        | [] => simp at hf
        | x :: xs =>
          simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, hf2]; injection hf with hx; subst hx; split
          · rename_i hp; rw [ih]
            · have ht : fromSL (tailSL sl) = (fromSL sl).tail := by
                have ⟨l, r, o⟩ := sl
                cases l with
                | nil => cases r with | nil => rfl | cons b bs => 
                  have := o.1 (by simp); simp_all; cases bs; rfl; contradiction
                | cons a as => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [tailSL, h, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
              rw [ht, hf2]; rfl
            · apply length_tail_lt_length; intro h; subst h; simp [headSL] at hh
          · simp

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 h =>
    simp [isEmpty, List.isEmpty_iff] at h
    simp [dropWhileSL, h, fromSL, nil, h.1, h.2]
  | case2 h1 h2 =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, fromSL, nil]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      cases sl; rename_i l r o; simp [fromSL, headSL]; cases l <;> cases r <;> simp_all
      simp at o; cases o.1 (by rfl) <;> (rename_i h; simp [h]); rename_i r_h r_t; cases r_t <;> simp_all
    cases h_fs : fromSL sl with | nil => rfl | cons x xs => simp [h_fs] at h_head; rw [h_head] at h2; contradiction
  | case3 h1 h2 hsl h3 ih =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ih]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      cases sl; rename_i l r o; simp [fromSL, headSL]; cases l <;> cases r <;> simp_all
      simp at o; cases o.1 (by rfl) <;> (rename_i h; simp [h]); rename_i r_h r_t; cases r_t <;> simp_all
    have h_tail : (fromSL sl).tail = fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
      cases sl; rename_i l r o; cases l with
      | nil => cases r with | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil] | cons r_h r_t =>
        simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; simp at o; cases o.1 (by rfl) <;> (rename_i h; simp [h]); cases r_t <;> simp_all
      | cons l_h l_t => cases r with | nil => by_cases h : l_t = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
        | cons r_h r_t => by_cases h: l_t = [] <;> simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
    cases h_fs : fromSL sl with | nil => simp [h_fs] at h_head; rw [h_head] at h2; contradiction
    | cons x xs => simp [h_fs] at h_head; injection h_head; subst x; simp [dropWhile, h_fs, h3, h_tail]
  | case4 h1 h2 hsl h3 =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3]
    have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      cases sl; rename_i l r o; simp [fromSL, headSL]; cases l <;> cases r <;> simp_all
      simp at o; cases o.1 (by rfl) <;> (rename_i h; simp [h]); rename_i r_h r_t; cases r_t <;> simp_all
    cases h_fs : fromSL sl with | nil => rfl
    | cons x xs => simp [h_fs] at h_head; injection h_head; subst x; simp [dropWhile, h3, h_fs]

induction ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ using wellFoundedInduction (measure lengthSL) with
  | h sl ih =>
    unfold dropWhileSL
    split_ifs with h_e
    · have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h_e; simp [fromSL, h1, h2, nil, dropWhile]
    · match h_h: headSL sl with
      | none => simp [headSL_none_iff_nilSL.1 h_h, lengthSL] at h_e
      | some hsl =>
        have h_f : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
          have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl; cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            cases rhs with | nil => simp [headSL] at h_h | cons y ys =>
            simp [headSL] at h_h; subst y; simp [fromSL]
            simp at ok; cases ok.1 rfl with | inl h => simp at h | inr h => cases ys; rfl; simp at h
          | cons x xs => simp [headSL] at h_h; subst x; simp [fromSL]
        simp [h_h]; split_ifs with hp
        · have h_t : (fromSL sl).tail = fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
            have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl; cases xs with
            | nil =>
              cases ys with | nil => rfl | cons b bs =>
              simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; simp at ok; cases ok.1 rfl with
              | inl h => simp [h] | inr h => cases bs; rfl; simp at h
            | cons a as => by_cases h : as = [] <;> (by_cases ye : ys = [] <;> simp [h, ye, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL])
          match h_fs : fromSL sl with
          | [] => simp [h_fs] at h_f
          | x :: xs =>
            simp [h_fs] at h_f; subst x
            simp [dropWhile, hp, ← ih (tailSL sl) (length_tail_lt_length sl (by intro h; subst h; simp [nil, lengthSL] at h_e)), h_t]
        · match h_fs : fromSL sl with
          | [] => simp [h_fs] at h_f
          | x :: xs => simp [h_fs] at h_f; subst x; simp [dropWhile, hp]

have h_h_sl := h_h ⟨l, r, o⟩; rw [hh] at h_h_sl
    cases h_f : fromSL ⟨l, r, o⟩ with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons x xs => simp_all [Chapter1.dropWhile]

match hfs : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [hfs, ← h_head_eq] at hhead
    | x :: xs => simp [hfs, List.head?, ← h_head_eq] at hhead; subst x; simp [hfs, dropWhile, hp, ← h_tail_eq]
  | case4 sl hne hsl hhead hp =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [hne, hhead, hp]
    have h_head_eq : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      have ⟨l, r, ok⟩ := sl; simp [headSL, fromSL]; split <;>
      rename_i h; { simp at h; simp [h.1, h.2] }; { simp at ok; simp [ok] }
    match hfs : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [hfs, ← h_head_eq] at hhead
    | x :: xs => simp [hfs, List.head?, ← h_head_eq] at hhead; subst x; simp [hfs, dropWhile, hp]

induction (mk lhs rhs ok) using wellFoundedInduction (measure lengthSL) with
  | h sl ih =>
    unfold dropWhileSL; simp
    split_ifs with h_e
    · have : sl = nil := by cases sl; simp [isEmpty, nil] at h_e; simp [h_e.1, h_e.2]
      simp [this, fromSL, nil, Chapter1.dropWhile]
    · match h_h : headSL sl with
      | none => have := headSL_none_iff_nilSL.mp h_h; simp [this, isEmpty] at h_e
      | some hsl =>
        have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
          have ⟨l, r, o⟩ := sl; simp [headSL, fromSL] at *; split at h_h <;> (rename_i h; simp at h; subst_vars; simp [h_h]); simp at o; simp [o]
        rw [Chapter1.dropWhile]; simp [h_head, h_h]
        if hp : p hsl then
          simp [hp]; rw [ih (tailSL sl) (length_tail_lt_length _ (by intro h_n; rw [h_n] at h_h; simp [headSL, nil] at h_h))]
          congr; have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl; cases xs with
          | nil => induction ys with | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil] | cons b bs _ => simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; have := ok.1 (by simp); simp [this]
          | cons a as => induction ys with | nil => by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL] | cons b bs _ => by_cases h: as = [] <;> simp [tailSL, h, fromSL, splitInTwoSL]
        else simp [hp]

| case4 h_ne hsl h_h h_p =>
    unfold dropWhileSL; simp [h_ne, h_h, h_p]
    rw [h_ht _ _ h_h, dropWhile, h_p, ← h_ht _ _ h_h]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p with
  | case1 h =>
    have ⟨l, r, o⟩ := sl; simp [dropWhileSL, h, fromSL, Chapter1.dropWhile]; simp_all
  | case2 h1 h2 =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, fromSL, Chapter1.dropWhile, headSL_none_iff_nilSL.1 h2, nil]
  | case3 h1 h2 hsl h3 ih =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h1, h2, h3]
    have hh : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      have ⟨l, r, o⟩ := sl; simp [fromSL, headSL]; split <;> simp_all; (rename_i h; try cases h); simp_all; (rename_i h; cases o.2 h <;> simp_all)
    have ht : (fromSL sl).tail = fromSL (tailSL sl) := by
      have ⟨l, r, o⟩ := sl; simp [tailSL, fromSL]; split <;> simp_all
      · rename_i h; cases o.1 h <;> simp_all [fromSL, nil]
      · split <;> simp_all [fromSL, splitInTwoSL, List.take_append_drop]
    match hf : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [hf, hh] at h2
    | x :: xs => simp [hf, hh] at h2; subst x; simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, h3, hf, ht, ih]
  | case4 h1 h2 hsl h3 =>
    rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h1, h2, h3]
    have hh : (fromSL sl).head? = headSL sl := by
      have ⟨l, r, o⟩ := sl; simp [fromSL, headSL]; split <;> simp_all; (rename_i h; try cases h); simp_all; (rename_i h; cases o.2 h <;> simp_all)
    match hf : fromSL sl with
    | [] => simp [Chapter1.dropWhile]
    | x :: xs => simp [hf, hh] at h2; subst x; simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, h3, hf]

else
      simp [h_e]
      match h_h: headSL sl with
      | none => exact (h_e (headSL_none_iff_nilSL.mp h_h ▸ by simp [isEmpty, nil])).elim
      | some hsl =>
        simp; match h_f : fromSL sl with
        | [] => exact (sl_noempty_l_noempty sl h_e h_f).elim
        | x :: xs =>
          have hx : x = hsl := by
            cases sl; rename_i as bs ok; simp [fromSL, headSL] at h_f h_h
            split at h_h <;> (simp at h_h; subst h_h; simp [h_f])
          subst hx; simp [dropWhile]; split_ifs with h_p
          · rw [← ih, (by
              cases sl; rename_i as bs ok; cases as with
              | nil =>
                cases bs with | nil => rfl | cons b bs =>
                  simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]; have := ok.1 (by rfl)
                  cases this with | inl h => simp [h] at * | inr h => simp [h] at *; rfl
              | cons a as =>
                by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [tailSL, h, fromSL, splitInTwoSL])]
            exact length_tail_lt_length sl (headSL_none_iff_nilSL.not.mp (by rw [h_h]; simp))
          · simp [h_f]

induction sl using dropWhileSL.induct p
  · rename_i h; simp [dropWhileSL, h, fromSL, isEmpty] at *; simp [h.1, h.2]
  · rename_i h hhead; rw [dropWhileSL]; simp [h, hhead]
    have h_h := congr_fun example_3 (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)
    simp [Function.comp, hhead] at h_h
    cases h_fs : fromSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok) with | nil => rfl | cons x xs => simp [h_fs] at h_h
  · rename_i h hsl hhead p_true ih
    have h_h := congr_fun example_3 sl; have h_t := example_2 sl
    simp [Function.comp, hhead] at h_h
    cases h_fs : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [h_fs] at h_h
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [h_fs] at h_h h_t; simp [dropWhileSL, h, hhead, p_true, ih, dropWhile, h_fs, h_h, h_t]
  · rename_i h hsl hhead p_false
    have h_h := congr_fun example_3 sl; simp [Function.comp, hhead] at h_h
    cases h_fs : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [h_fs] at h_h
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [h_fs] at h_h; simp [dropWhileSL, h, hhead, p_false, dropWhile, h_fs, h_h]

· rename_i sl hne hhead; simp [dropWhileSL, hne, hhead, Chapter1.dropWhile, ← _example_3]
  · rename_i sl hne hhead hsl hp ih; simp [dropWhileSL, Chapter1.dropWhile, hne, hhead, hp, ih, ← _example_2, ← _example_3]
  · rename_i sl hne hhead hsl hp; simp [dropWhileSL, Chapter1.dropWhile, hne, hhead, hp, ← _example_3]

have h_head : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl; rw [← h2]
      cases lhs <;> cases rhs <;> simp [headSL, fromSL, *]
      simp at ok; cases ok.1 (by simp) <;> simp_all
    cases hfs : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [hfs] at h_head
    | cons x xs => simp [hfs] at h_head; subst x; simp [hfs, Chapter1.dropWhile, hp]

· rfl
  · simp [dropWhileSL, *]; rw [← headSL_none_iff_nilSL] at *; simp [*, fromSL, nil]
  · rename_i sl _ hsl h_h p_hsl ih
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_h, p_hsl, ih]
    have := h_head sl; rw [h_h] at this
    match h_fs : fromSL sl with | x::xs => simp [h_fs] at this; subst x; simp [dropWhile, p_hsl, ih, h_tail, h_fs]
  · rename_i sl _ hsl h_h p_hsl
    simp [dropWhileSL, h_h, p_hsl]
    have := h_head sl; rw [h_h] at this
    match h_fs : fromSL sl with | x::xs => simp [h_fs] at this; subst x; simp [dropWhile, p_hsl]

have := h_head sl; rw [h2] at this; cases hfs : fromSL sl <;> simp_all
  | case3 h1 hsl h2 h3 ih =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3, ih, h_tail]
    have := h_head sl; rw [h2] at this; cases hfs : fromSL sl <;> simp_all
  | case4 h1 hsl h2 h3 =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, h1, h2, h3]
    have := h_head sl; rw [h2] at this; cases hfs : fromSL sl <;> simp_all

have hhead : (fromSL sl).head? = some hsl := by
      have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl; simp [headSL, fromSL] at h2 ⊢
      split at h2 <;> simp_all
      cases ok.1 (by simp_all) <;> simp_all
    cases h_L : fromSL sl with
    | nil => simp [h_L] at hhead
    | cons x xs =>
      simp [h_L] at hhead; subst x; simp [h_L, hp, dropWhile]
else simp [hp]
